title: NodeModeShape
description: NodeModeShape: Node mode shape in global coordinates, normalised to 1.

UX.description: Translational X component of the mode shape in global coordinates. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UY.description: Translational Y component of the mode shape in global coordinates. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UZ.description: Translational Z component of the mode shape in global coordinates. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RX.description: Rotational component about the X-axis of the mode shape in global coordinates. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

RY.description: Rotational component about the Y-axis of the mode shape in global coordinates. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

RZ.description: Rotational component about the Z-axis of the mode shape in global coordinates. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
